lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਅਧੇਰਾ ਬੰਦੀਖਾਨਾ ਅਉਗਣ ਪੈਰਿ ਲੁਹਾਰੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: lab adheraa bandeekhaanaa aaugan pair luhaaree |3|
lines.english: Greed is the dark dungeon, and demerits are the shackles on his feet. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂੰਜੀ ਮਾਰ ਪਵੈ ਨਿਤ ਮੁਦਗਰ ਪਾਪੁ ਕਰੇ ਕੋੁਟਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: poonjee maar pavai nit mudagar paap kare kouttavaaree |
lines.english: His wealth constantly batters him, and sin acts as the police officer.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਦਿ ਪੁਰਖ ਕਉ ਅਲਹੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਸੇਖਾਂ ਆਈ ਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: aad purakh kau alahu kaheeai sekhaan aaee vaaree |
lines.english: The Primal Lord God is called Allah. The Shaykh's turn has now come.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਾਵੈ ਚੰਗਾ ਭਾਵੈ ਮੰਦਾ ਜੈਸੀ ਨਦਰਿ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੀ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: bhaavai changaa bhaavai mandaa jaisee nadar tumaaree |4|
lines.english: Whether the mortal is good or bad, he is as You look upon him, O Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਵਲ ਦੇਵਤਿਆ ਕਰੁ ਲਾਗਾ ਐਸੀ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਚਾਲੀ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: deval devatiaa kar laagaa aisee keerat chaalee |5|
lines.english: The temples of the gods are subject to taxes; this is what it has come to. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੂਜਾ ਬਾਂਗ ਨਿਵਾਜ ਮੁਸਲਾ ਨੀਲ ਰੂਪ ਬਨਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: koojaa baang nivaaj musalaa neel roop banavaaree |
lines.english: The Muslim devotional pots, calls to prayer, prayers and prayer mats are everywhere; the Lord appears in blue robes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਮੀਆ ਸਭਨਾਂ ਜੀਆਂ ਬੋਲੀ ਅਵਰ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: ghar ghar meea sabhanaan jeean bolee avar tumaaree |6|
lines.english: In each and every home, everyone uses Muslim greetings; your speech has changed, O people. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤੂ ਮੀਰ ਮਹੀਪਤਿ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕਉਣ ਹਮਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: je too meer maheepat saahib kudarat kaun hamaaree |
lines.english: You, O my Lord and Master, are the King of the earth; what power do I have to challenge You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਾਰੇ ਕੁੰਟ ਸਲਾਮੁ ਕਰਹਿਗੇ ਘਰਿ ਘਰਿ ਸਿਫਤਿ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੀ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: chaare kuntt salaam karahige ghar ghar sifat tumaaree |7|
lines.english: In the four directions, people bow in humble adoration to You; Your Praises are sung in each and every heart. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੀਰਥ ਸਿੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਪੁੰਨ ਦਾਨ ਕਿਛੁ ਲਾਹਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਦਿਹਾੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: teerath sinmrit pun daan kichh laahaa milai dihaarree |
lines.english: Making pilgrimages to sacred shrines, reading the Simritees and giving donations in charity - these do bring any profit.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਮੇਕਾ ਘੜੀ ਸਮੑਾਲੀ ॥੮॥੧॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naam milai vaddiaaee mekaa gharree samaalee |8|1|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, glorious greatness is obtained in an instant, remembering the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||8||1||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹਿੰਡੋਲੁ ਘਰੁ ੨ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: basant hinddol ghar 2 mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Basant Hindol, Second House, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਿਕ ਉਪਾਵ ਜਤਨ ਕਰਿ ਥਾਕੇ ਬਾਰੰ ਬਾਰ ਭਰਮਾਈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anik upaav jatan kar thaake baaran baar bharamaaee |1|
lines.english: It makes so many efforts, and grows weary, but still, it wanders restlessly again and again. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਂਇਆ ਨਗਰਿ ਇਕੁ ਬਾਲਕੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਥਿਰੁ ਨ ਰਹਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: kaaneaa nagar ik baalak vasiaa khin pal thir na rahaaee |
lines.english: Within the body-village there lives a child who cannot hold still, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਈਐ ਭਜੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਨੀਸਾਣੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satigur milai ta pooraa paaeeai bhaj raam naam neesaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, he finds the Perfect Lord. Meditating and vibrating on the Name of the Lord, he receives the Insignia of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਬਾਲਕੁ ਇਕਤੁ ਘਰਿ ਆਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: mere tthaakur baalak ikat ghar aan |
lines.english: O my Lord and Master, Your child has come home, to be one with You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਮਿਰਤਕੁ ਮੜਾ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਹੈ ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਵਸਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: eihu miratak marraa sareer hai sabh jag jit raam naam nahee vasiaa |
lines.english: These are dead corpses, these bodies of all the people of the world; the Name of the Lord does not dwell in them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈ ਨਿਰਖਤ ਨਿਰਖਤ ਸਰੀਰੁ ਸਭੁ ਖੋਜਿਆ ਇਕੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਚਲਤੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mai nirakhat nirakhat sareer sabh khojiaa ik guramukh chalat dikhaaeaa |
lines.english: I have examined and studied and searched my entire body, and as Gurmukh, I behold a miraculous wonder.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਉਦਕੁ ਚੁਆਇਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਆ ਰਸਿਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: raam naam gur udak chuaaeaa fir hariaa hoaa rasiaa |2|
lines.english: The Guru leads us to taste the water of the Lord's Name, and then we savor and enjoy it, and our bodies are rejuvenated. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹਰੁ ਖੋਜਿ ਮੁਏ ਸਭਿ ਸਾਕਤ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਘਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: baahar khoj mue sabh saakat har guramatee ghar paaeaa |3|
lines.english: All the faithless cynics searched outside and died, but following the Guru's Teachings, I have found the Lord within the home of my own heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿਓ ਸੁਦਾਮਾ ਭਾਵਨੀ ਧਾਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਆਗੈ ਦਾਲਦੁ ਭੰਜਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: milio sudaamaa bhaavanee dhaar sabh kichh aagai daalad bhanj samaaeaa |4|
lines.english: Sudama loved God, who came to meet him; God sent everything to his home, and ended his poverty. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੀਨਾ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਭਏ ਹੈ ਜਿਉ ਕ੍ਰਿਸਨੁ ਬਿਦਰ ਘਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: deenaa deen deaal bhe hai jiau krisan bidar ghar aaeaa |
lines.english: God is Merciful to the meekest of the meek; Krishna came to the house of Bidar, a devotee of low social status.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਪੈਜ ਵਡੇਰੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰਿ ਆਪਿ ਰਖਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam kee paij vadderee mere tthaakur aap rakhaaee |
lines.english: Great is the glory of the Name of the Lord. My Lord and Master Himself has enshrined it within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੀ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਹੈ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਾ ਦਹ ਦਿਸਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jan kee usatat hai raam naamaa deh dis sobhaa paaee |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is the praise of His humble servant. It brings him honor in the ten directions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਸਭਿ ਸਾਕਤ ਕਰਹਿ ਬਖੀਲੀ ਇਕ ਰਤੀ ਤਿਲੁ ਨ ਘਟਾਈ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: je sabh saakat kareh bakheelee ik ratee til na ghattaaee |5|
lines.english: Even if all the faithless cynics continue slandering me, it is not diminished by even one iota. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕਉ ਜਨੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਵੈ ਗੁਣ ਮਹਿ ਗੁਣ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: jan kau jan mil sobhaa paavai gun meh gun paragaasaa |
lines.english: The humble person meeting with another humble person obtains honor. In the glory of the Lord, their glory shines forth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿੰਦਕੁ ਸਾਕਤੁ ਖਵਿ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਤਿਲੁ ਅਪਣੈ ਘਰਿ ਲੂਕੀ ਲਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: nindak saakat khav na sakai til apanai ghar lookee laaee |6|
lines.english: The slanderers and the faithless cynics cannot endure it at all; they have set fire to their own houses. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਕੇ ਜਨ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਪਿਆਰੇ ਜੋ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਦਾਸਨਿ ਦਾਸਾ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: mere tthaakur ke jan preetam piaare jo hoveh daasan daasaa |7|
lines.english: The servants of my Lord and Master are loved by the Beloved. They are the slaves of His slaves. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਜਲੁ ਅਪਰੰਪਰੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਆਪੇ ਮੇਲਿ ਮਿਲਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape jal aparanpar karataa aape mel milaavai |
lines.english: The Creator Himself is the Water; He Himself unites us in His Union.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਜਿਉ ਜਲੁ ਜਲਹਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥੮॥੧॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak guramukh sehaj milaae jiau jal jaleh samaavai |8|1|9|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Gurmukh is absorbed in celestial peace and poise, like water blending with water. ||8||1||9||
